center.name: 夏威夷島
center.summary: 夏威夷島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Hawaiian hawk、淡蓝梅花雀、黄嘴蜡嘴鹀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The io is one of two extant birds of prey that are native to Hawaii, the other being the pueo (Hawaiian short-eared owl) and fossil evidence indicates that it inhabited the island of Hawaii, Molokai, Oahu, Maui and Kauai at one time. Today, it is known to breed only on the Big Island, in stands of native ōhia lehua (Metrosideros polymorpha) trees

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: error on IUCN Red List] }} The lavender waxbill (Glaucestrilda caerulescens) is a common species of estrildid finch native to Central Africa and successfully introduced on Hawaiʻi

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occurs in Brazil, Paraguay, Bolivia, Uruguay, and northern Argentina and has been introduced on the island of Hawaiʻi
